title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Kaido as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Who the hell are these people?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Didn't we sink all the enemy ships?!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's something at the bottom of the water!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to set sail on such a small boat in such a storm!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This time an attack came from behind!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were a stupid amount of ships and Samurais gathered by the harbor over there but what the hell is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was almost about to sink them all for getting in my way!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The messy one! Are you finally joining us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you think I'm going to let you go Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a different matter now!! We were just supposed to sink some Samurais on a boat...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're from the "Worst Generation"!!! I thought we captured them!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to go after Samurasi on a tiny little boat!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 28 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
